query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.status, p.clientId, c.name as clientName, c.userId, c.email, c.whatsappPhone, u.name as userName, u.email as userEmail
FROM projects p 
LEFT JOIN clients c ON p.clientId = c.id 
LEFT JOIN users u ON c.userId = u.id
ORDER BY p.id DESC
LIMIT 5;
